Name: BigBubbleGenerator
Notes: A generator that creates Big Bubbles, which can be entered and controlled by the player.

Obj_arg0.Name: Spawn Timer
Obj_arg0.Description: Time between generated bubbles. If set to other than -1, spawned Big Bubbles will detach from the generator, popping a short while later.

Obj_arg1.Name: Minimum Size
Obj_arg1.Description: Minimum size of the bubbles, multiplied by 100. Default is 100.

Obj_arg2.Name: Maximum Size
Obj_arg2.Description: Maximum size of the bubbles, multiplied by 100. Default is 100.

Obj_arg3.Name: Move Limitter ID
Obj_arg3.Description: ID of the BigBubbleMoveLimitter associated with generated bubbles. Default is -1, which disables this. Nonexistent limiters crash the game.

Obj_arg4.Name: Bubble Shape
Obj_arg4.Description: Shape of the generated bubbles. In the vanilla game, only spherical bubbles are used.

SW_APPEAR.Description: Appears when this switch is activated.
